summary: Published reply-router runx skill with green local harness (2/2 cases passed), opened PR #211 against runxhq/runx containing SKILL.md, X.yaml, and run.mjs. The skill classifies inbound replies (interested, objection, out_of_office, wrong_person, unsubscribe), appends suppression events with CAS for unsubscribes, and emits typed routing decisions for other classifications. Harness verified with runx-cli 0.6.15.

observations.detail: Exact package name as required by bounty acceptance criteria
Both inline harness cases passed: sealed_unsubscribe_suppression (sealed) and stop_ambiguous_or_unsealed (failure)
Case 1: unsubscribe reply triggers suppression event with CAS. Case 2: ambiguous reply stops with failure, no suppression, no routing.
PR opened against runxhq/runx with skills/reply-router/X.yaml, SKILL.md, and run.mjs
Five classification types with signal-based matching and confidence scoring

observations.value: CAS append_event with idempotency_key and expected_version
observations.detail: Unsubscribe replies append a suppression event to a local event store with compare-and-swap version checking
Non-unsubscribe replies emit a typed routing decision naming a bounded send target for a separate governed send-as run
All typed inputs as specified in the bounty acceptance criteria
All typed outputs as specified in the bounty acceptance criteria
